title: OWASP Top Ten Web Application Security Risks | OWASP Foundation
body: The most current released version is the OWASP Top Ten 2025. Previous versions are available at OWASP Top Ten 2021 and OWASP Top 10 2017 (PDF).

title: The OWASP Top Ten 2025
body: It was started in 2003 to help organizations and developer with a starting point for secure development. Over the years it's grown into a pseudo standard that is used as a baseline for compliance, education, and vendor tools. ... We are planning to announce the release of the OWASP Top 10:2025 at ...

title: OWASP Top 10:2025
body: It represents a broad consensus about the most critical security risks to web applications. This is the 2025 version of the OWASP Top 10.

title: OWASP Top 10: Vulnerabilities, Risks and How to Fix Them
body: 3 days ago - The OWASP Top 10 is the industry's standard awareness framework for web application security risks, updated in 2025 with expanded supply chain coverage and a new emphasis on alerting alongside logging.

title: OWASP Top 10 2025: What Changed & New Vulnerabilities - Parasoft
body: 2 weeks ago - OWASP Top 10:2025 introduced two new categories and major re-rankings. See what changed from 2021, what each vulnerability means, and how to update your AppSec program.
